## Change summary

Describe what changed, why it is needed, and how it was verified.

## License and provenance confirmation

- [ ] I have the right to submit every part of this contribution.

      `GPL-3.0-only`, as described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.

### Third-party material

Write `None` or provide the exact provenance and license details.

## Project checks

- [ ] New source files are present in the applicable `.vcxproj` and
      `.vcxproj.filters` files.
- [ ] User-visible strings are synchronized in both language packs and the i18n
      audit passes, or this change does not affect user-visible strings.
- [ ] Shared R0/R3 protocol and IOCTL registration rules in `AGENTS.md` are
      satisfied, or they do not apply.
